name: IdsBalProdRunCycUpd

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MAX(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.TargetSys}' AND SRC_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SourceSys}' AND SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' AND ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN = 'N' AND CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET T.ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN = 'Y', T.CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T INNER JOIN cte S ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = S.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = S.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = S.SUBJ_CD WHERE T.RUN_CYC_NO <= S.RUN_CYC_NO AND T.ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN = 'N' AND T.CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN = 'N';

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2007 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


CALLED BY:    IdsProdBalCntl

PROCESSING:
                  
                The Job Updates the P_RUN_CYC table with the ROW_TO_ROW_BAL_IN and CLMN_SUM_BAL_IN set to 'Y' after balancing is done for the subject area

Annotations:
Job IdsEdwCmnPrctLangD Load.
Read the Load ready file created in Extract job or PKEY job
Load rejects are redirected into a Reject file

This file is an append
Load file created in the previous job will be loaded into the target DB2 table here. 

Update logic; "Update then Insert" Or "Insert then Update" will be chosen depending on the nature of data going into the table. If there are more updates than Inserts, then Update then Insert should be selected.
When the Inserts are more than Updates, then Insert then Update should be selected
